_comment: M2 egress data document. Adapted from Lupus/docker-mitm-bridge opa-policies/data.yml (allowed_domains + unrestricted_domains tiers), here merged into a single domain allow-list because M2's FlowDesc has no HTTP method to split GET/HEAD-only from all-methods. The two upstream tiers are preserved as keys so the split can be re-introduced at M5. M2.1: domain lists became host->ports maps (a bare host = web ports 80/443 only). `sandbox_ports` is the M2 per-trust-domain dimension.

_upstream_tiers_for_M5._comment: Verbatim from docker-mitm-bridge data.yml; inert today. At M5 the policy re-splits on these so restricted domains allow only GET/HEAD.
